::: {.column-screen .pagebottom}
::: {.column-body}
::: {.text-center .px-5 .py-5}
::: {.column width=40% .px-1}
[![](public/home-collab-white.svg){width=5em}](./topics/events.qmd)  
[Missing Something?](./topics/events.qmd)
:::
::: {.column width=40% .px-1}
[![](public/home-collab-white.svg){width=5em}](./topics/trainings.qmd)  
[Contact RDM Support Desk](./topics/trainings.qmd)
:::
:::
:::
:::
